case_title: ARRON CHAMBERLIN et al RESPONDENT VS. EDWARD MURPHY APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: COURT TRIAL ON SEP-29-2004 TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON SEPTEMBER 29, 2004 BY JUDGE SALDAMANDO
RECORD ON APPEAL JUDGEMENT FILED BY APPELLANT MURPHY, EDWARD AS TO RESPONDENT CHAMBERLIN, ARRON CHAMBERLIN, KELLY HEARING SET FOR SEP-22-2004 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF SEP-22-2004 - CONTINUED TO SEP-29-2004 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 525
MINUTES FOR SEP-29-2004 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 318

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT CHAMBERLIN, ARRON CHAMBERLIN, KELLY RECOVER FROM APPELLANT MURPHY, EDWARD $3,647.22 PRINCIPAL, $57.00 COSTS, $150.00 PER CCP 116.780(C), TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,854.22, SEE SCANNED DOC

TRIAL (SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL)CONCLUDED. IN .1 DAYS. MATTER, HAVING BEEN SUBMITTED ON SEPT. 29, 2004, COURT NOW VACATES AND SETS THE PREVIOUS DEFAULT JUDGMENT, AND RENDERS JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF RESPONDENTS AARON CHAMBERLIN AND KELLY CHAMBERLIN AGAINST APPELLANT EDWARD MURPHY IN THE AMOUNT OF $3,647.22, $57.00 IN COSTS PLUS $150 PER CCP 116.780(C) FOR LOST EARNINGS AND TRANSPORTATION EXPENSES. SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT. JUDGE SALDAMANDO, G. PEERLESS, CLK.
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF SEP-29-2004 TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 206 FOR REASSIGNMENT - PARTIES WOULD NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM (525)
MISCELLANEOUS CIVIL SPECIAL SETTING CALENDAR OF SEP-29-2004 - SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 318 FOR COURT TRIAL ON SEP-29-2004 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 318.
COURT TRIAL ON SEP-29-2004 OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT ENTERED.
